---
name: I have a record or correction
about: Share a document, photo, story, or a fix for something that looks wrong
title: "[CONTRIBUTION] "
labels: ["family-contribution"]
---

**Who is this about?**
<!-- Name, and birth year or how they're related, if you know. e.g. "Harry Warner, my great-grandfather" -->


**What do you have?**
<!-- Check any that apply -->
- [ ] A document or certificate (birth, death, marriage, census, military…)
- [ ] A photo
- [ ] An obituary
- [ ] A family story or memory
- [ ] A correction to something already in the tree
- [ ] Other


**Details**
<!-- Tell us what you know. Dates, places, names. If it's a correction, what's
currently wrong and what it should be. -->


**Where did it come from?** (if you know)
<!-- e.g. "Ancestry.com", "found in my mother's papers", "photographed the headstone
at Oakwood Cemetery" -->


**Attach it here**
<!-- Drag and drop a photo or PDF right into this box. Optional but hugely helpful! -->
